name: Minimal Sparse Input — Single Sentence Patient Journey
input: Show how a patient goes from ER triage to admission, surgery, recovery, and discharge with satisfaction scores.
qualityCriteria: Diagram type is journey for a patient experience path
ER Triage as first section or task
Satisfaction scores present (1-5 range) for each task
At least 5 distinct tasks in the journey
Proper journey syntax with section headers
Logical score progression (triage lower, recovery improving)
